_comment: Cross-repo workflow bundles: the multi-repo matters one library alone cannot cover. Every (repo, form_id) pair must exist in catalog/merged_catalog.json (enforced by tests/test_workflows.py). Steps marked 'inferred': true are this project's own inference about membership/role, not something the owning repo's catalog or docs state; verify before relying on them. 'optional': true marks forms only some variants of the matter need. Where a matter has mutually exclusive openers (e.g. testate vs intestate, LLC vs corporation), 'alternative_group' names the choice set — pick one.

re_purchase_closing.name: Real-estate purchase / closing
re_purchase_closing.description: Maine real-estate transfer: the transfer tax declaration filed with the deed, plus the probate/court companion forms some closings need (estate-owned property, divorce-ordered conveyance). Deed instruments themselves are not court forms and are out of scope of all four libraries.

steps.role: Real Estate Transfer Tax Declaration filed with the deed at the registry
estate tax lien discharge (Statement of Value) when the seller is a decedent's estate
Certificate of Value when the seller is a decedent's estate
Real Estate Certificate when the conveyance implements a divorce judgment
Real Estate Order when the conveyance implements a divorce judgment

probate_estate_administration.name: Probate estate administration
probate_estate_administration.description: Open, administer, and close a Maine decedent's estate: probate court filings plus the fiduciary/estate tax returns the estate owes (federal and Maine).
sources: transactional-tax-forms catalog/by_domain.json (probate domain + companion_repo pointer to maine-probate-forms)

steps.role: Application for Informal Probate / Appointment — Intestate (no will)
Application for Informal Probate of Will or Appointment (testate)
Small Estate Affidavit — collection of personal property without full administration
Personal Representative acceptance
bond for the Personal Representative, when required
estate inventory
Notice Concerning Fiduciary Relationship to the IRS
federal estate (and GST) tax return, when the estate is large enough to owe one
Maine estate tax return
federal fiduciary income tax return for the estate
Maine fiduciary income tax return
estate tax lien discharge when the estate conveys Maine real property
probate account
sworn statement to close the estate (informal)
closing statement for a small estate

corp_formation.name: Business entity formation
corp_formation.description: Form a new Maine business entity (LLC, business corporation, or nonprofit) with the Secretary of State, then the federal/Maine tax registrations and elections a new entity makes.
sources: transactional-tax-forms catalog/by_domain.json (corporations domain + companion_repo pointer to maine-corporation-forms)
maine-corporation-forms catalog/forms_index.json (formation titles per entity type)

steps.role: Certificate of Formation — Maine LLC
Articles of Incorporation — Maine business corporation
Articles of Incorporation — Maine nonprofit corporation
apply for the new entity's EIN
entity classification election, if electing out of the default classification
S corporation election, if electing S status
Maine employer withholding return, once the entity has employees
Maine withholding allowance certificate collected from each employee

corp_dissolution.name: Business entity dissolution
corp_dissolution.description: Wind down and dissolve a Maine business entity with the Secretary of State, plus the final Maine tax returns the dissolving entity files.
sources: maine-corporation-forms catalog/forms_index.json (dissolution/cancellation titles per entity type)

steps.role: Articles of Dissolution — Maine business corporation
Articles of Dissolution by incorporators or initial directors (never-commenced corporation)
Certificate of Cancellation — domestic Maine LLC
Statement of Intent to Dissolve — domestic nonprofit (first step of the nonprofit two-step)
Articles of Dissolution — domestic nonprofit, after the statement of intent
final Maine corporate income tax return for a dissolving corporation
final Maine employer withholding return, if the entity had employees
